revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月廿九]][[zh:四月廿九]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 29|qq=April 29}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Jōan (Japan)|ja|Jōan (era)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōan (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1173|en|1173|qid=Q19688|lt=1173|1=1173}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|qid=Q2617|lt=June 11|1=June 11}} ) – The monk {{ill|Mongaku|en|Mongaku|qid=Q11080166|lt=Mongaku|1=Mongaku}} storms into the residence of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} at {{ill|Hōjūjidono|ja|法住寺殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōjūjidono|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 法住寺 (京都市)|1=Hōjūjidono|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1072965}} , demanding the restoration of {{ill|Jingo-ji|en|Jingo-ji|qid=Q1075034|lt=Jingo-ji|1=Jingo-ji}} . He is arrested and later exiled to {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|1=Izu (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16766555}} . == Births == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bunei|1=Bun'ei}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1264|en|1264|qid=Q5514|lt=1264|1=1264}} {{ill|May 26|en|May 26|qid=Q2586|lt=May 26|1=May 26}} ) – {{ill|Prince Koreyasu|en|Prince Koreyasu|qid=Q586532|lt=Prince Koreyasu|1=Prince Koreyasu}} , 7th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1326|en|1326|qid=Q5782|lt=1326|1=1326}} ). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna (Japan)|1=Genna}} 3 (Gregorian {{ill|1617|en|1617|qid=Q6798|lt=1617|1=1617}} {{ill|June 2|en|June 2|qid=Q2624|lt=June 2|1=June 2}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshitsugu|ja|前田利次|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshitsugu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Maeda Toshitsugu|qid=Q11397439}} , daimyō and first lord of {{ill|Toyama Domain|en|Toyama Domain|qid=Q1088437|lt=Toyama Domain|1=Toyama Domain}} , son of {{ill|Maeda Toshitsune|en|Maeda Toshitsune|qid=Q587204|lt=Maeda Toshitsune|1=Maeda Toshitsune}} , the 3rd lord of {{ill|Kaga Domain|ja|Kaga Domain|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ {{ill|1674|en|1674|qid=Q7620|lt=1674|1=1674}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|qid=Q2619|lt=June 12|1=June 12}} ) – {{ill|Taguchi Ukichi|en|Taguchi Ukichi|qid=Q4121064|lt=Taguchi Ukichi|1=Taguchi Ukichi}} , {{ill|Economist|en|Economist|qid=Q188094|lt=economist|1=Economist}} and {{ill|Historian|en|Historian|qid=Q201788|lt=historian|1=Historian}} (+ {{ill|1905|en|1905|qid=Q2047|lt=1905|1=1905}} ). * Ansei 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1857|en|1857|qid=Q7680|lt=1857|1=1857}} {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}} ) – {{ill|Ōwada Tateki|ja|大和田建樹|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōwada Tateki|1=Takeki Ōwada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11261562}} , {{ill|kokugaku scholar|ja|国文学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kokugaku scholar|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本文学研究者|1=scholar of Japanese literature|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11508193}} , {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} , and lyricist of {{ill|Tetsudō Shōka|ja|Railway唱歌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tetsudō Shōka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ {{ill|1910|en|1910|qid=Q2075|lt=1910|1=1910}} ). == Deaths == {{ill|Benkei|ja|辨慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491470|1=Benkei}} , monk and retainer of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qid=Q310445|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitsune|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|28|4|30|3|29|5|4|0429|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
